embeds.description:
## **✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ: Partnership Requirements :･ﾟ✧:･ﾟ✧**

### **partnership applications must adhere to the following:**
<:pinkheart:1378494177599295509> Server must be related to zzz/hoyoverse/wuwa games
<:pinkheart:1378494177599295509> Server must follow discord ToS and guidelines
<:pinkheart:1378494177599295509> Must have a welcoming friendly environment and also have a proper verification/moderation system in place.
<:pinkheart:1378494177599295509> Staff must be active and friendly - working moderation system.
<:pinkheart:1378494177599295509> Leaks MUST be behind opt-in roles
<:pinkheart:1378494177599295509> Server must be SFW
> *In the case you may have NSFW content - it must be completely minor gated behind strict verification AND heavily moderated.*
<:pinkheart:1378494177599295509> Duplicate servers are allowed to apply - but will be evaluated more thoroughly.
> We DO NOT accept duplicate sistership servers.
<:pinkheart:1378494177599295509> Servers must have a minimum of **50 members** excluding bots.
> *This is to encourage your own growth before applying - however we may accept smaller servers. Quality matters.*
<:pinkheart:1378494177599295509> Hangout Servers must have **150 Members** excluding bots.
<:pinkheart:1378494177599295509> A server admin or partner representative must be in our server.

### **Our server is currently OPEN to partnerships!**

If you wish to partner with us, please open an admin ticket in  <#1386497006599671950> where we will review your request!

-# Please note our previous partners/current partners may not adhere to these requirements but are still our partners.
